problem: Cardiac care requires connected monitoring solutions across multiple care settings, but fragmented systems create gaps in patient data flow. Clinicians need smart beds, patient monitoring, and care communication tools that integrate seamlessly to improve cardiac patient outcomes.
solution: Hillrom (now part of Baxter) provides connected care solutions including next-generation smart beds, patient monitoring systems, and care communication applications. Their Welch Allyn portfolio includes cardiac monitoring devices and diagnostic cardiopulmonary solutions. The platform advances connected care across hospital and ambulatory settings, with 10,000+ employees supporting healthcare providers in over 100 countries.
